---
title: "Publications"
description: "// peer-reviewed work and preprints"
page-layout: full
title-block-style: default
listing:
  contents: ["*/index.qmd", "*.qmd"]
  exclude:
    filename: index.qmd
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [title, date, categories, description]
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
toc: false
---

::: {.empty-note}
Nothing published here yet — in the meantime, see [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=xzyk_aQAAAAJ&hl=en).
:::
